<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Query; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Query\Expression as ExpressionContract; use Illuminate\Database\Grammar; /** * @template TValue of string|int|float */ class Expression implements ExpressionContract { /** * Create a new raw query expression. * * @param TValue $value */ public function __construct( protected $value, ) { } /** * Get the value of the expression. * * @param \Illuminate\Database\Grammar $grammar * @return TValue */ public function getValue(Grammar $grammar) { return $this->value; } }
